tasks.title: Setup React Project Structure 🚀
tasks.description: Initialize a new React project with Vite, configure ESLint, and set up the folder structure for components, hooks, and utils.

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript Type Errors 🐛
tasks.description: Review and fix all TypeScript compilation errors in the codebase. Ensure proper type definitions for props and state.

tasks.title: Implement REST API Integration 🔌
tasks.description: Create service layer for API calls, set up axios interceptors, and implement error handling for all endpoints.

tasks.title: Write Unit Tests 💻
tasks.description: Write Jest and React Testing Library tests for 80% code coverage. Focus on components, hooks, and utility functions.

tasks.title: Optimize Bundle Size & Performance ⚡
tasks.description: Analyze webpack bundle, implement code splitting, lazy loading, and optimize image assets for production.
